name: --quiet flag behavior
summary: `--quiet` / `-q` suppresses all non-essential startup messages across CLI and interactive mode
detail: Implemented in `cli/args.ts`, `main.ts`, and `interactive-mode.ts`. Acts as a hard override for `quietStartup` settings. `--verbose` still overrides it for the model scope line. Suppresses extension errors, status/deprecation warnings, version checks, and model fallbacks.
content: Implemented in `cli/args.ts`, `main.ts`, and `interactive-mode.ts`. Acts as a hard override for `quietStartup` settings. `--verbose` still overrides it for the model scope line. Suppresses extension errors, status/deprecation warnings, version checks, and model fallbacks.

name: nanoPencil print mode
summary: Invoked with `--print` or `-p` for non-interactive, stdout/stdin streaming.
detail: Print mode processes a prompt and exits without TUI. Useful for piping into scripts or CI. Command: `npx tsx cli.ts --print "your prompt here"`.
content: Print mode processes a prompt and exits without TUI. Useful for piping into scripts or CI. Command: `npx tsx cli.ts --print "your prompt here"`.
